texto: I have seen purer liquors, better segars, finer tobacco, truer guns and pistols, larger dirks and bowie knives, and prettier courtesans here in San Francisco than in any other place I have ever visited; and it is my unbiased opinion that California can and does furnish the best bad things that are available in America.
explicacao: Citação de Hinton Helper sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I have seen purer liquors, better segars, finer tobacco, truer guns and pistols, larger dirks and…” articula reflexao, history, knives em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como knives e san-francisco.
